zippy-barbecue-sauce.name: Zippy Barbecue Sauce
instructions: Whisk ketchup, water, molasses, Worcestershire sauce, white wine vinegar, Dijon mustard, brown sugar, salt, hot pepper sauce, granulated garlic, and black pepper together in a small heavy-bottomed saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes. Remove from heat; cool completely.
Pour into a sterilized glass jar. Store, uncovered, in the refrigerator for 8 hours or overnight. This allows the flavors to blend and reduce any sharpness from the vinegar.
